heroes.prompt_used:
HD-2D hand-drawn pixel-art character portrait. Octopath Traveler / Triangle Strategy / Sea of Stars / Live A Live HD-2D visual register. Pixel-resolution character sprite with hand-drawn illustration sensibility, painterly cinematic lighting, atmospheric depth-of-field backdrop.

A young fire-mage stands knee-deep in dark flooded water inside an abandoned coal mine. Smoldering coal seams glow ember-orange along the cavern walls in the depth-blurred background. She wears soot-stained miner's robes with canary-yellow accents at sleeve and collar, a small open flame cupped in her raised hand lighting her face from below, a small canary perched on her shoulder turning its head toward the flame. Ember-orange and deep red highlights with charred edges and glowing-seam textures. 3/4 view portrait, isekai-genre-readable, painterly atmospheric lighting.

The character ignites and kindles. Style register: martial. The substrate of escalation — what begins small and becomes total.

HD-2D illustrated pixel-art quality, single character centered, no text, no UI elements.

HD-2D hand-drawn pixel-art character portrait. Octopath Traveler / Triangle Strategy / Sea of Stars / Live A Live HD-2D visual register. Pixel-resolution character sprite with hand-drawn illustration sensibility, painterly cinematic lighting, atmospheric depth-of-field backdrop.

A lithe smuggler caught mid-stride in the moment after a defensive lightning ward discharged through them — discharge-yellow electricity still arcing across their leather travel coat, hair lifted by static. They are running across stone paving toward the viewer, with a tall fortified border wall and lantern-lit checkpoint gate visible blurred in the background. A small sealed contraband bundle clutched under one arm. Discharge-yellow and electric-white highlights with arc-burn marks across their gear and jagged refraction at the body's edges. 3/4 view, dynamic motion pose, isekai-genre-readable.

The character arcs and discharges. Style register: scientific. The substrate of sudden traversal — what crosses gaps without crossing the space between.

A hooded cartographer standing at a wooden drafting table inside a high stone tower, charcoal-stained fingertips holding a quill that leaves a fading smoke-trail across a half-erased map. The map shows territory dissolving into pure shadow at its edges; the cartographer's lower body and the table's far edges similarly dissolve into quiet purple shadow. Charcoal sketches and rolled charts lie scattered. Quiet purple and deep grey highlights with withdrawal-blur and dim-creep at the figure's edges. Tower window behind shows a darkening sky. 3/4 view, contemplative pose, isekai-genre-readable.

The character drains and withdraws. Style register: shadow. The substrate of withdrawal — occlusion, what removes presence without striking.

A robed cleric stands ankle-deep at the edge of a flooded subterranean forge, holding a tall candle-staff whose flame is the only meaningful light in the cavern. The flooded forge bellows and anvil are partially submerged in the background, residual warm-amber glow rising from the still-cooling hearth-stones beneath the water. The cleric wears forge-burned vestments with clerical-amber trim and warm-gold rope-belt, the candle-flame's light catching reverent features. Soft radiant motes drift around the candle. Clerical amber and warm gold highlights with soft glow halo and radiant-mote particulate. 3/4 view, devotional pose, isekai-genre-readable.

The character consecrates and reveals. Style register: clerical. The substrate of revelation — amplification-of-aligned; what makes what is true brighter.

A masked plague-priest standing in the middle of a deserted cobblestone city street, mid-swing of a long-chained brass censer that trails a wide arc of luminous pale grey-white cleansing smoke across the frame. They wear a long wind-pleated coat with pale slate and silver-white trim, a long-beaked plague-doctor mask hides their face, hood pulled up. The background shows quarantined buildings with chalk-marked doors and shuttered windows in atmospheric haze. Pale slate and silver-white highlights with kinetic motion-streak and drifting particulate around the censer arc. 3/4 view, mid-action swing pose, isekai-genre-readable.

A solemn court-scribe stands before an ornate throne-room lectern, mouth open mid-decree, small fragments of glowing marble visibly forming on the air around their lips as the spoken words crystallize into permanent stone. They wear scholar's robes with loam-brown and burnt-amber trim, gold-edged sash of office, a heavy carved-stone seal-ring on one hand pressed to a parchment. The background shows the dim throne hall in atmospheric depth-of-field, with a sliver of the throne itself visible behind. Loam-brown and burnt-amber highlights with weathered-stone texture and root-tangle motif at the robe edges. 3/4 view, dignified pose, isekai-genre-readable.

The character anchors and holds. Style register: martial. The substrate of unyielding — positional refusal; what does not move and will not be moved.
